'''鈭歞h-g-v''' ('''kadhagav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poke|poke]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poke|poke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-g-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadhagav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhagav|thidhagav]] || [[word:jidhagav|jidhagav]] || [[word:shidhagav|shidhagav]] || [[word:kidhagav|kidhagav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhagav|thuthudhagav]] || [[word:jujudhagav|jujudhagav]] || [[word:shushudhagav|shushudhagav]] || [[word:kukudhagav|kukudhagav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhagav|thudhagav]] || [[word:judhagav|judhagav]] || [[word:shudhagav|shudhagav]] || [[word:kudhagav|kudhagav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhagav|thudhagav]] || [[word:judhagav|judhagav]] || [[word:shudhagav|shudhagav]] || [[word:kudhagav|kudhagav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhagav|thedhagav]] || [[word:jedhagav|jedhagav]] || [[word:shedhagav|shedhagav]] || [[word:kedhagav|kedhagav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhagav|thothodhagav]] || [[word:jojodhagav|jojodhagav]] || [[word:shoshodhagav|shoshodhagav]] || [[word:kokodhagav|kokodhagav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhagav|thodhagav]] || [[word:jodhagav|jodhagav]] || [[word:shodhagav|shodhagav]] || [[word:kodhagav|kodhagav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhagav|thodhagav]] || [[word:jodhagav|jodhagav]] || [[word:shodhagav|shodhagav]] || [[word:kodhagav|kodhagav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]] || [[word:dhagav|dhagav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhagav|th忙dhagav]] || [[word:j忙dhagav|j忙dhagav]] || [[word:sh忙dhagav|sh忙dhagav]] || [[word:k忙dhagav|k忙dhagav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhagav|thathadhagav]] || [[word:jajadhagav|jajadhagav]] || [[word:shashadhagav|shashadhagav]] || [[word:kakadhagav|kakadhagav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhagav|thadhagav]] || [[word:jadhagav|jadhagav]] || [[word:shadhagav|shadhagav]] || [[word:kadhagav|kadhagav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhagav|thadhagav]] || [[word:jadhagav|jadhagav]] || [[word:shadhagav|shadhagav]] || [[word:kadhagav|kadhagav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhagav|shadhagav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhagav|goshadhagav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhagav|gokishadhagav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhagavn眉|shadhagavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkn眉|goshadhagavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagavn眉|gokishadhagavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhagavsh毛|shadhagavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhagavnksh毛|goshadhagavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhagavsh毛|gokishadhagavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagavro|shadhagavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkro|goshadhagavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagavro|gokishadhagavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagavmu|shadhagavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkmu|goshadhagavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagavmu|gokishadhagavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhagavsher|shadhagavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhagavnksher|goshadhagavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhagavsher|gokishadhagavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhagavng|shadhagavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkng|goshadhagavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhagavng|gokishadhagavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhagavya|shadhagavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkya|goshadhagavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhagavya|gokishadhagavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhagavyam|shadhagavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkyam|goshadhagavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhagavyam|gokishadhagavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhagavn眉sh毛|shadhagavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkn眉sh毛|goshadhagavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhagavn眉sh毛|gokishadhagavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagavn眉ro|shadhagavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkn眉ro|goshadhagavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagavn眉ro|gokishadhagavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagavn眉mu|shadhagavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkn眉mu|goshadhagavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagavn眉mu|gokishadhagavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhagavsh毛n眉|shadhagavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagavnksh毛n眉|goshadhagavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagavsh毛n眉|gokishadhagavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagavsh毛ro|shadhagavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagavnksh毛ro|goshadhagavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagavsh毛ro|gokishadhagavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagavsh毛mu|shadhagavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagavnksh毛mu|goshadhagavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagavsh毛mu|gokishadhagavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhagavron眉|shadhagavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkron眉|goshadhagavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagavron眉|gokishadhagavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhagavrosh毛|shadhagavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkrosh毛|goshadhagavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhagavrosh毛|gokishadhagavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagavromu|shadhagavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkromu|goshadhagavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagavromu|gokishadhagavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhagavmun眉|shadhagavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkmun眉|goshadhagavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagavmun眉|gokishadhagavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhagavmush毛|shadhagavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkmush毛|goshadhagavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhagavmush毛|gokishadhagavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagavmuro|shadhagavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagavnkmuro|goshadhagavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagavmuro|gokishadhagavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
